artifacts.claim_boundary: This witness binds the immutable target-owned native receipt to its exact run, checks, and non-calibration native obligations.

claim_boundary: SkillGuard supervises the complete native khaos-brain-update maintenance unit, its target-specific obligations, and the sole current enforced closure. It does not ship with or execute on the consumer machine.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: Only exact current receipts for the target skill's declared checks are supervised. The target skill retains all domain judgment, including positive/shallow behavior and direct native completion.

functions.business_intent: Require an explicit current-conversation request, keep all four retained automations paused during mutation, then let the native updater apply the exact captured state, read it back, run the final installed-health check, mark CURRENT, clean its snapshot, and emit its own terminal receipt.
functions.signature: Input x State -> Set(Output x State)

obligations.description: Require an explicit user request in the current invocation and a safe manual check result before mutation.
Snapshot local knowledge, settings, automation state, and rollback authority.
Update only through the authorized Git fast-forward path.
Run the versioned resumable history and maintenance-debt migration.

Use the versioned upgrade owner to convert every valid legacy card directly into current LogicGuard models, scoped meshes, deterministic projections, the exact active index, and the generation pointer with no normal-runtime legacy reader.
Install complete trees transactionally and retire the exact Architect and system-update automation surfaces.
Reject activation when legacy semantic authority, consumer-side author-control contamination, or any incompatible residual survives; migration failure restores the complete pre-upgrade surface.
Require current target-owned migration, projection, FlowGuard, LogicGuard, retrieval, and installed-health evidence before restoration is authorized.
Restore the exact captured automation state only after every target-owned hard gate passes; otherwise keep every survivor paused.
End an applicable manual route only after exact restoration readback, a final installed-health check, CURRENT state, and snapshot cleanup; only declared no-update may close earlier.
Reject check-only or install-only completion and require the full native receipt.

action.summary: Load the target-owned inputs and prove every intake obligation before mutation.
Run the native maintenance owner through every declared execution branch.
Require the current terminal receipt plus positive and shallow target-owned checks before closure.
